category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/libvips/nip4 describes nip4 as an image processing spreadsheet and spreadsheet-like interface to libvips.
source_facts.description says nip4 is an image processing spreadsheet.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses nip4.
docs_sources: Official README links libvips.org introduction and migration posts for nip4.
Official repository README is the primary project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jcupitt/nip4, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes a spreadsheet-like interface to libvips and GTK4 UI toolkit.
source_facts.description identifies an image processing spreadsheet.
